summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OCR expense splitting app. Backend APIs mostly functional (9/10 passing), frontend UI working well with good Neo-Brutalism design implementation. OCR functionality intermittent due to budget constraints.

critical_bugs.issue: Budget exceeded error: 'Current cost: 0.003605, Max budget: 0.001'
critical_bugs.impact: OCR functionality fails intermittently, blocking core receipt scanning feature

integration_issues.flow: Group creation with non-existent member emails
integration_issues.issue: Error handling could be more user-friendly - no clear error message shown to user

design_issues.issue: Neo-Brutalism design is well implemented with proper fonts (Cabinet Grotesk/Work Sans), colors, and shadows
affected_screen: All pages - design is correctly implemented

passed_tests: Groups page navigation and modal functionality
New Expense page form elements and navigation
Backend API endpoints (9/10): auth/register, auth/login, groups CRUD, expenses CRUD, settlements calculation
OCR functionality (when budget allows) - successfully extracted merchant, date, total, and items

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major flows working, minor UX improvements needed)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix OCR budget limit issue - either increase budget limit for EMERGENT_LLM_KEY or implement fallback/retry mechanism. OCR is a core feature and currently fails due to budget constraints. Also improve error messaging for group creation when member emails don't exist.
